form.formComment: Resuming after three-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into fourth after showing early speed, behind Signature Look at Maryborough over 1690m in a 3yo MAIDEN on January 12 at $41. Looks ready to fire after a recent trial win and gets the ace draw so could make a winning return.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr4) over 2200m at Ballarat beaten 60 m by Onyx (2:44.40) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 5 at $41. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 3rd (Fr6) over 1690m at this track beaten 5.5 m by Shudaboughtaboat (2:06.10) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on February 26 at $15. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Weakened inside the final 300m to be beaten 57.7m.

Weakened inside the final 400m to be beaten 59.2m.
Out of position at the start, Checked near the 1400m when Keisha Galloped.

form.formComment: Last start 11th (Fr4) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 75 m by All Over It (2:35.70) in MAIDEN on April 8 at $126. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr2) over 1750m at Swan Hill, at the bell was 7th-13.8 beaten 19 m by Steel Miki (2:12.50) in MAIDEN on March 31 at $14. Draws well so may do better.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fifth behind All Over It at Bendigo over 2150m in a MAIDEN on April 8 at $26. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1750m at Swan Hill was 3rd-4.7 at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Steel Miki (2:12.50) in MAIDEN on March 31 at $26. Could be ready to strike.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and taken over marker pegs near the 300m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of three months. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into seventh behind Stylistik at this track over 2180m in a MAIDEN on January 15 at $21. Keep safe fresh.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh behind Roman Charlie at Ballarat over 2200m in a 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 9 at $10. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 3rd (Sr3) over 2690m at this track beaten 12 m by Lazenby (3:31.10) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 26 at $6.50. Can make amends.

Shifted ground at the 300m, inconveniencing Im The Reason.

form.formComment: Returns to racing after a spell of four months. Well beaten at the end of her last preparation when ninth at very big odds behind Monaghan Boy. Might need this run and others rate better.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly by Ultimate Machete out of Swanline having her first start. Finished fifth in a trial on April 7 at Melton over 2240m. Profiles well so expect a bold showing.
